name: Zoho CRM MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Zoho CRM — enabling AI agents to manage leads, contacts, accounts, deals, and activities in Zoho CRM. Allows sales automation agents to create and update records, run searches, manage pipelines, and retrieve CRM analytics from Zoho's widely-used CRM platform.
use_cases: Managing leads and contacts in Zoho CRM from sales automation agents
Creating and updating deal records and pipeline stages from revenue operations agents
Querying customer data and activity history from customer success agents
Automating follow-up task creation and scheduling from CRM workflow agents
not_for: Real-time customer transaction processing (CRM record management focus)
Zoho Suite products beyond CRM (contacts Zoho CRM specifically)
best_when: A sales team using Zoho CRM wants AI agents to automate CRM data entry, lead management, and pipeline tracking — reducing manual CRM work while keeping records current.
avoid_when: You use Salesforce, HubSpot, or other CRM platforms. Zoho CRM has its own API quirks — evaluate carefully against your specific Zoho edition and module configuration.

auth.notes: Zoho OAuth 2.0. Registered Zoho client app required. Use minimal CRM scopes. Multi-datacenter: specify correct Zoho domain (US, EU, AU, IN).

pricing.notes: Zoho CRM has a free tier. Community MCP server is free open source. API access included in all tiers.

performance.rate_limits: Zoho CRM API: 10,000-200,000 calls/day depending on edition

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: CRM data contains customer PII — GDPR compliance required for EU customer data
Zoho multi-datacenter: must specify correct domain (accounts.zoho.com vs .eu vs .in) for your org
Module field names vary by Zoho CRM edition and customization — validate field mappings
Duplicate record creation risk: implement deduplication logic in agent workflows
Community implementation — verify against current Zoho CRM API v2 documentation
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Customer CRM data is sensitive PII. GDPR compliance for EU customers. Multi-datacenter data residency. OAuth with minimal scopes. SOC2 certified.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer PII in CRM records. GDPR compliance required. Multi-datacenter data residency options. OAuth minimal scopes. SOC2/ISO27001.
